measure.name: res_stock_arguments_post_hpxml
measure.description: Measure that post-processes the output of the BuildResidentialHPXML and BuildResidentialScheduleFile measures.
measure.modeler_description: Passes in all ResStockArgumentsPostHPXML arguments from the options lookup, processes them, and then modifies output of other measures.

argument.name: hpxml_path
argument.description: Absolute/relative path of the HPXML file.

argument.name: hvac_flex_peak_offset
argument.display_name: HVAC Load Flexibility: Peak Offset (deg F)
argument.description: Offset of the peak period in degrees Fahrenheit.

argument.name: hvac_flex_pre_peak_duration_hours
argument.description: Duration of the pre-peak period in hours.

argument.name: hvac_flex_pre_peak_offset
argument.display_name: HVAC Load Flexibility: Pre-Peak Offset (deg F)
argument.description: Offset of the pre-peak period in degrees Fahrenheit.

argument.name: flex_random_shift_minutes
argument.description: Number of minutes to randomly shift the peak period. If minutes is less than timestep, it will be assumed to be 0.

argument.name: ev_flex_enabled
argument.description: Whether to enable EV flexibility.

argument.name: air_leakage_percent_reduction
argument.description: Reduction (%) on the air exchange rate value.

argument.name: refrigerator_usage_multiplier
argument.description: Multiplier on the refrigerator energy usage that can reflect, e.g., high/low usage occupants.

argument.name: clothes_dryer_usage_multiplier
argument.description: Multiplier on the clothes dryer energy usage that can reflect, e.g., high/low usage occupants.

argument.name: clothes_washer_usage_multiplier
argument.description: Multiplier on the clothes washer energy usage that can reflect, e.g., high/low usage occupants.

argument.name: cooking_range_oven_usage_multiplier
argument.description: Multiplier on the cooking range/oven energy usage that can reflect, e.g., high/low usage occupants.

argument.name: dishwasher_usage_multiplier
argument.description: Multiplier on the dishwasher energy usage that can reflect, e.g., high/low usage occupants.

argument.name: extra_refrigerator_usage_multiplier
argument.description: Multiplier on the extra refrigerator energy usage that can reflect, e.g., high/low usage occupants.

argument.name: freezer_usage_multiplier
argument.description: Multiplier on the freezer energy usage that can reflect, e.g., high/low usage occupants.

argument.name: misc_plug_loads_television_usage_multiplier
argument.description: Multiplier on the television energy usage that can reflect, e.g., high/low usage occupants.

argument.name: misc_plug_loads_other_usage_multiplier
argument.description: Multiplier on the other energy usage that can reflect, e.g., high/low usage occupants.

argument.name: bathroom_fans_start_hour
argument.description: The hour of the day when the bathroom fans run.

argument.name: kitchen_fans_start_hour
argument.description: The hour of the day when the kitchen fans run.

argument.name: schedules_vacancy_periods
argument.description: Specifies the vacancy periods. Enter a date like "Dec 15 - Jan 15". Optionally, can enter hour of the day like "Dec 15 2 - Jan 15 20" (start hour can be 0 through 23 and end hour can be 1 through 24). If multiple periods, use a comma-separated list.

argument.name: building_id
argument.description: The building unit number (between 1 and the number of samples).

argument.name: ev_miles_driven_per_year
argument.display_name: Electric Vehicle: Miles Driven Per Year
argument.description: The annual miles the electric vehicle is driven.

argument.name: ev_fraction_charged_home
argument.display_name: Electric Vehicle: Fraction Charged at Home
argument.description: The fraction of charging energy provided by the at-home charger to the electric vehicle.

argument.name: ev_efficiency_percent_increase
argument.description: The increase (fraction) in efficiency of the electric vehicle.
